case_title: ELISA MESCH VS. ERIC HORN et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-10-2008 - JUDGMENT. CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-10-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-10-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MESCH, ELISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORN, ERIC SHEEN, JASON T. $1,614.86 PRINCIPAL, $9.75 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,674.61, DEFENDANTS HAVE JOINT AND SEVERAL LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
